name: Nevada County Library Grass Valley Royce Branch
self_description: The Nevada County Library system consists of six library locations. In 1902, a free library and reading room was established in Nevada City. The Vision is a center of enrichment, in a strong, empowered, and literate rural community.
notes: Institutional, mission-focused text but not direct first-person voice.

name: Nevada County Library Madelyn Helling Branch
self_description: The Nevada County Library system consists of six library locations. In 1902, a free library and reading room was established in Nevada City. The Vision is a center of enrichment, in a strong, empowered, and literate rural community.
notes: Institutional text. Same pages as first venue (shared website).

name: Nevada County Media
self_description: Nevada County Media (NCM), formerly known as (NCTV) has been serving the community for over 30+ years. A 501c3 non-profit public benefit corporation that empowers creativity, storytelling and community engagement by providing education, resources and opportunities through digital media.

name: Ron's Real Records
self_description: Rare & Affordable Records, Tapes, Discs & Tons of Toys & Fun Collectibles!!!

name: San Juan Ridge Community Library
self_description: The mission of the San Juan Ridge Community Library is to provide an inspirational and educational hub while giving the residents, including students, of the San Juan Ridge excellent library services including book exchange, DVD rentals, and internet access in a central location.

name: Sibylline Press
self_description: Sibylline Press publishes the work of brilliant women over 50, exclusively. We are looking for work that is relevant and compelling. Sibylline's publishing engine is powered by the ingenuity of shrewd wise women. Sibylline Press takes its name from the Sibylline Books, the ancient writings of wise older women, the Sibyls.

name: Sound Check Music
self_description: Sound Check is buying used gear every business day we are open. We buy amps, guitars, bass guitars, stomp boxes, percussion and other effects. We also offer amp, guitar, and band instrument repair.

name: The Union
notes: News outlet homepage; no clear self-description found in scraped content (mostly article listings).

name: Toad Hall Books
self_description: Toad Hall has everything I want in a used bookstore: an abundance of books dating from recent publications back to the 19th century (many of which are out of print).
notes: Third-party review excerpt, not venue's own words.

name: YubaNet
self_description: Launched in 1999 to put the then-revolutionary power of the Internet into the hands of our foothill and mountain communities, YubaNet.com delivers daily news to the Sierra, from the Sierra. Our newsroom overlooks the South Yuba River just outside historic Nevada City, California.

name: 1849 Brewing Company
notes: Homepage content is minimal navigation/menu only; no self-description present.

name: A Victorian Rose
self_description: A restored 1891 Victorian vacation home conveniently located in the Downtown Historic District of Grass Valley. A uniquely remodeled Victorian, 4-bedroom vacation rental equipped with all modern amenities.

name: Alta Sierra Village Inn

name: Alta Sierra Wine Shop
self_description: The goal is simple. To search out, evaluate, and purchase beautiful wines, and then share those discoveries with you. We are the owners of a lovely, cozy, friendly shop where guests can taste, visit with friends, and find their new favorite wine.

name: Arquils Winery
self_description: I am an ardent believer that all wines need to be a medium for great experiences. Arquils' wines are designed using zero intervention philosophy. My Achilles heel is the grape juice beautifully fermented and aged.
notes: Carlos Caruncho's first-person voice; condensed from longer passage.

name: Avanguardia Wines Tasting Room
self_description: A small ultra-boutique winery, home of non-traditional blended wines. We specialize in premium blends from rare and unusual grape varieties, crafted from 2-6 different grape varieties, many of which are Italian and out of the mainstream.

name: Bicycle Thief
notes: Online ordering menu only; no self-description or venue information.

name: BrewHaus
self_description: We believe the best things in life are meant to be shared, savored, and never rushed. BrewBilt Brewing brings a place where you can slow down, enjoy the people you're with, and savor great beer and food in a relaxed, family-friendly, dog-friendly setting.

name: Broad Street Inn
self_description: Built in 1870, Broad Street Inn is a small, family-owned green business that prides itself on providing clean, comfortable accommodations at affordable rates. A Victorian inn with six contemporary, eco-friendly rooms.

name: Bubba's Bagels
notes: Facebook page title only; no descriptive content scraped.

name: Carrington's Fine Wines
self_description: Carrington's Fine Wines is a specialty wine retailer in Nevada City offering an unparalleled combination of personalized, expert service with a hand-picked selection of exquisite wines. With more than 30 years in the wine business, Cal Carrington is available to guide you toward wines suited to your budget and occasion.
